115	@record_function('rejection_sample')
116	def rejection_sample(
117	    target_logits: Tensor,
118	    draft_token_ids: LongTensor,
119	    bonus_token_ids: LongTensor,
120	    sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs,
121	    draft_probs: Tensor | None = None,
122	):

124	
125	    Args:
126	        target_logits (Tensor): Processed target logits in shape of
127	            [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]. Already processed
128	            by FusedLogitsProcessor (temperature, top-k, top-p applied).
129	        draft_token_ids (LongTensor): [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
130	        bonus_token_ids (LongTensor): [batch_size]
131	        sampling_inputs (SamplingInputs): Sampling parameters.
132	        draft_probs (Tensor): [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None.
133	    """
134	    assert draft_probs is None or draft_probs.is_contiguous()
135	    if not draft_token_ids.is_contiguous():
136	        draft_token_ids = draft_token_ids.contiguous()
137	
138	    if not target_logits.is_contiguous():
139	        target_logits = target_logits.contiguous()
140	
141	    batch_size, num_spec_tokens = draft_token_ids.shape
142	    vocab_size = target_logits.shape[-1]
143	    device = target_logits.device
144	
145	    # Determine sampling policy
146	    is_all_greedy = (sampling_inputs.max_top_k == 1)
147	    is_all_random = False
148	    is_greedy = None
149	    if not is_all_greedy:
150	        if sampling_inputs.top_k is not None:
151	            is_greedy = (sampling_inputs.top_k == 1)
152	            is_all_random = not is_greedy.any().item()
153	        else:
154	            is_all_random = True
155	
156	    # Create output buffer
157	    output_token_ids = torch.full(
158	        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1),
159	        PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID,
160	        dtype=torch.long,
161	        device=device,
162	    )
163	
164	    # 1. Greedy path (skip if all_random)
165	    if not is_all_random:
166	        target_argmax = target_logits.argmax(dim=-1)  # [batch, num_spec]
167	        rejection_greedy_sample_kernel[(batch_size, )](
168	            output_token_ids,
169	            draft_token_ids,
170	            target_argmax,
171	            bonus_token_ids,
172	            is_greedy,
173	            num_spec_tokens,
174	        )
175	        if is_all_greedy:
176	            return _extract_outputs(output_token_ids, num_spec_tokens)
177	
178	    # 2. Compute target probs from processed logits
179	    target_probs = target_logits.softmax(dim=-1, dtype=torch.float32)
180	
181	    # 3. Uniform random [batch, num_spec] (float64 to avoid exact 0.0)
182	    uniform_probs = torch.rand(
183	        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens),
184	        dtype=torch.float64,
185	        device=device,
186	    )

192	        device=device,
193	    )
194	    q.exponential_()
195	    inv_q = q.reciprocal()

197	    recovered_token_ids = torch.empty(
198	        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens),
199	        dtype=torch.long,
200	        device=device,
201	    )
202	    BLOCK_SIZE = 8192

204	        recovered_token_ids,

207	        target_probs,

213	    )

216	    rejection_random_sample_kernel[(batch_size, )](
217	        output_token_ids,

222	        recovered_token_ids,
223	        uniform_probs,

227	        NO_DRAFT_PROBS=draft_probs is None,
228	    )

230	    return _extract_outputs(output_token_ids, num_spec_tokens)

233	@triton.jit(do_not_specialize=['num_spec_tokens'])
234	def rejection_greedy_sample_kernel(
235	    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1]
236	    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
237	    target_argmax_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]

241	):

246	    mismatch.

248	    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
249	    if is_greedy_ptr is not None:
250	        is_greedy = tl.load(is_greedy_ptr + req_idx).to(tl.int1)
251	        if not is_greedy:
252	            return
253	
254	    out_stride = num_spec_tokens + 1
255	    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens

257	    rejected = False
258	    for pos in range(num_spec_tokens):
259	        if not rejected:
260	            draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
261	            target_argmax_id = tl.load(target_argmax_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
262	            tl.store(
263	                output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + pos,
264	                target_argmax_id,
265	            )
266	            if draft_token_id != target_argmax_id:
267	                rejected = True
268	
269	    if not rejected:
270	        bonus_token_id = tl.load(bonus_token_ids_ptr + req_idx)

278	def rejection_random_sample_kernel(
279	    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1]
280	    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
281	    draft_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None
282	    target_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]
283	    bonus_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size]
284	    recovered_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
285	    uniform_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
286	    is_greedy_ptr,  # [batch_size]
287	    num_spec_tokens,
288	    vocab_size,
289	    NO_DRAFT_PROBS: tl.constexpr,
290	):
291	    """Random rejection sampling kernel.
292	
293	    Grid: (batch_size,)
294	    For each non-greedy request: accept if target_prob/draft_prob >=
295	    uniform, else use recovered token.
296	    """
297	    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
298	    if is_greedy_ptr is not None:
299	        is_greedy = tl.load(is_greedy_ptr + req_idx).to(tl.int1)
300	        if is_greedy:
301	            return
302	
303	    out_stride = num_spec_tokens + 1
304	    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens
305	
306	    rejected = False
307	    for pos in range(num_spec_tokens):
308	        if not rejected:
309	            draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
310	            if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
311	                draft_prob = 1
312	            else:
313	                draft_prob = tl.load(draft_probs_ptr + (req_idx * draft_stride + pos) * vocab_size + draft_token_id)
314	            target_prob = tl.load(target_probs_ptr + (req_idx * draft_stride + pos) * vocab_size + draft_token_id)
315	            uniform_prob = tl.load(uniform_probs_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
316	
317	            if draft_prob > 0 and target_prob / draft_prob >= uniform_prob:
318	                token_id = draft_token_id
319	            else:
320	                rejected = True
321	                token_id = tl.load(recovered_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
322	            tl.store(
323	                output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + pos,
324	                token_id,
325	            )
326	
327	    if not rejected:
328	        bonus_token_id = tl.load(bonus_token_ids_ptr + req_idx)
329	        tl.store(
330	            output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + num_spec_tokens,
331	            bonus_token_id,
332	        )

335	@triton.jit
336	def sample_recovered_tokens_kernel(
337	    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
338	    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
339	    draft_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None
340	    target_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]
341	    inv_q_ptr,  # [batch_size, vocab_size]
342	    num_spec_tokens,
343	    vocab_size,
344	    BLOCK_SIZE: tl.constexpr,
345	    NO_DRAFT_PROBS: tl.constexpr,
346	):
347	    """Recovered token sampling kernel via Gumbel-max trick.
348	
349	    Grid: (batch_size, num_spec_tokens)
350	    For each position: find argmax of max(0, target_prob - draft_prob)
351	    * inv_q.
352	    """
353	    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
354	    pos = tl.program_id(1)
355	    if pos >= num_spec_tokens:
356	        return
357	
358	    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens
359	    token_idx = req_idx * draft_stride + pos
360	
361	    if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
362	        draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + token_idx)
363	
364	    max_val = float('-inf')
365	    recovered_id = 0
366	    for v in range(0, vocab_size, BLOCK_SIZE):
367	        vocab_offset = v + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE)
368	        vocab_mask = vocab_offset < vocab_size
369	
370	        if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
371	            prob = tl.load(
372	                target_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
373	                mask=(vocab_mask & (vocab_offset != draft_token_id)),
374	                other=0.0,
375	            )
376	        else:
377	            draft_prob = tl.load(
378	                draft_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
379	                mask=vocab_mask,
380	                other=0.0,
381	            )
382	            target_prob = tl.load(
383	                target_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
384	                mask=vocab_mask,
385	                other=0.0,
386	            )
387	            prob = tl.maximum(target_prob - draft_prob, 0.0)
388	
389	        inv_q = tl.load(
390	            inv_q_ptr + req_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
391	            mask=vocab_mask,
392	            other=0.0,
393	        )
394	
395	        score = prob * inv_q
396	        local_max, local_id = tl.max(score, axis=0, return_indices=True)
397	
398	        if local_max > max_val:
399	            max_val = local_max
400	            recovered_id = v + local_id
401	
402	    tl.store(output_token_ids_ptr + token_idx, recovered_id)

# Copyright (c) OpenMMLab. All rights reserved.
import torch
import triton
import triton.language as tl
from torch import LongTensor, Tensor, nn
from torch.profiler import record_function

from lmdeploy.pytorch.engine.logits_process import SamplingInputs

PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID = -1


class RejectionSampler(nn.Module):
    """Rejection sampler for speculative decoding.

    Implements the rejection sampling algorithm from the speculative decoding paper (
    https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.17192).
    Supports both greedy (argmax)
    and random (probabilistic) rejection, with per-sequence greedy detection
    via sampling_inputs.top_k.
    """

    def forward(
        self,
        target_logits: Tensor,
        draft_token_ids: LongTensor,
        bonus_token_ids: LongTensor,
        sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs,
        draft_probs: Tensor | None = None,
    ):
        """forward.

        Args:
            target_logits (Tensor): Processed target logits in shape of
                [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size].
            draft_token_ids (LongTensor): The input draft tokens in shape of
                [batch_size, num_spec_tokens].
            bonus_token_ids (LongTensor): The bonus token ids in shape of
                [batch_size].
            sampling_inputs (SamplingInputs): Sampling parameters.
            draft_probs (Tensor): The probability of draft model in shape of
                [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]. Default to ``None``.
        """
        output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, last_token_ids = rejection_sample(
            target_logits,
            draft_token_ids,
            bonus_token_ids,
            sampling_inputs=sampling_inputs,
            draft_probs=draft_probs,
        )
        return output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, last_token_ids


@record_function('rejection_sample')
def torch_greedy_rejection_sample(
    target_probs: Tensor,
    draft_token_ids: LongTensor,
    bonus_token_ids: LongTensor,
    sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs = None,
    draft_probs: Tensor | None = None,
):
    """Greedy reject sampler
    1. keep targets tokens that are equal to draft tokens
    2. keep first not equal target tokens
    3. add bonus tokens if all equal
    Args:
        target_probs: (batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size)
        draft_token_ids: (batch_size, num_spec_tokens)
        bonus_token_ids: (batch_size, 1)
    Returns:
        output_token_ids: (batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1)
    """
    assert draft_probs is None or draft_probs.is_contiguous()
    if bonus_token_ids.ndim == 1:
        bonus_token_ids = bonus_token_ids.unsqueeze(-1)
    target_token_ids = target_probs.argmax(dim=-1)

    masks = draft_token_ids == target_token_ids
    batch_size, num_spec_tokens = draft_token_ids.shape
    # check rest draft tokens
    range_data = torch.arange(num_spec_tokens, device=draft_token_ids.device)[None, :]
    equals = (masks.cumsum(dim=1) - 1) == range_data
    num_rejected_tokens = num_spec_tokens - equals.sum(dim=1)
    first_diff_indices = torch.argmin(equals.int(), dim=1, keepdim=True)
    keeps = range_data.repeat(batch_size, 1) <= first_diff_indices
    keeps = keeps | equals
    keep_token_ids = torch.where(keeps, target_token_ids, -1)
    # add bonus tokens
    keep_bonus_ids = torch.where(equals[:, -1:], bonus_token_ids, -1)
    output_token_ids = torch.cat([keep_token_ids, keep_bonus_ids], dim=1)
    # get last token ids
    last_indices = (torch.cat([keeps, equals[:, -1:]], dim=1).cumsum(dim=1) - 1)[:, -1].flatten()
    last_token_ids = output_token_ids[torch.arange(batch_size, device=draft_token_ids.device), last_indices]
    return output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, last_token_ids


def _extract_outputs(output_token_ids: Tensor, num_spec_tokens: int):
    """Extract num_rejected_tokens and last_token_ids from output_token_ids.

    Args:
        output_token_ids: [batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1]
        num_spec_tokens: number of speculative tokens

    Returns:
        output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, last_token_ids
    """
    batch_size = output_token_ids.size(0)
    valid_mask = output_token_ids != PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID
    num_accepted = valid_mask.sum(dim=1)
    num_rejected_tokens = num_spec_tokens + 1 - num_accepted
    last_token_ids = output_token_ids[torch.arange(batch_size, device=output_token_ids.device), num_accepted - 1]
    return output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, last_token_ids


@record_function('rejection_sample')
def rejection_sample(
    target_logits: Tensor,
    draft_token_ids: LongTensor,
    bonus_token_ids: LongTensor,
    sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs,
    draft_probs: Tensor | None = None,
):
    """Rejection sampling.

    Args:
        target_logits (Tensor): Processed target logits in shape of
            [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]. Already processed
            by FusedLogitsProcessor (temperature, top-k, top-p applied).
        draft_token_ids (LongTensor): [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
        bonus_token_ids (LongTensor): [batch_size]
        sampling_inputs (SamplingInputs): Sampling parameters.
        draft_probs (Tensor): [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None.
    """
    assert draft_probs is None or draft_probs.is_contiguous()
    if not draft_token_ids.is_contiguous():
        draft_token_ids = draft_token_ids.contiguous()

    if not target_logits.is_contiguous():
        target_logits = target_logits.contiguous()

    batch_size, num_spec_tokens = draft_token_ids.shape
    vocab_size = target_logits.shape[-1]
    device = target_logits.device

    # Determine sampling policy
    is_all_greedy = (sampling_inputs.max_top_k == 1)
    is_all_random = False
    is_greedy = None
    if not is_all_greedy:
        if sampling_inputs.top_k is not None:
            is_greedy = (sampling_inputs.top_k == 1)
            is_all_random = not is_greedy.any().item()
        else:
            is_all_random = True

    # Create output buffer
    output_token_ids = torch.full(
        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1),
        PLACEHOLDER_TOKEN_ID,
        dtype=torch.long,
        device=device,
    )

    # 1. Greedy path (skip if all_random)
    if not is_all_random:
        target_argmax = target_logits.argmax(dim=-1)  # [batch, num_spec]
        rejection_greedy_sample_kernel[(batch_size, )](
            output_token_ids,
            draft_token_ids,
            target_argmax,
            bonus_token_ids,
            is_greedy,
            num_spec_tokens,
        )
        if is_all_greedy:
            return _extract_outputs(output_token_ids, num_spec_tokens)

    # 2. Compute target probs from processed logits
    target_probs = target_logits.softmax(dim=-1, dtype=torch.float32)

    # 3. Uniform random [batch, num_spec] (float64 to avoid exact 0.0)
    uniform_probs = torch.rand(
        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens),
        dtype=torch.float64,
        device=device,
    )

    # 4. Recovered tokens via Gumbel-max trick
    q = torch.empty(
        (batch_size, vocab_size),
        dtype=torch.float32,
        device=device,
    )
    q.exponential_()
    inv_q = q.reciprocal()

    recovered_token_ids = torch.empty(
        (batch_size, num_spec_tokens),
        dtype=torch.long,
        device=device,
    )
    BLOCK_SIZE = 8192
    sample_recovered_tokens_kernel[(batch_size, num_spec_tokens)](
        recovered_token_ids,
        draft_token_ids,
        draft_probs,
        target_probs,
        inv_q,
        num_spec_tokens,
        vocab_size,
        BLOCK_SIZE,
        NO_DRAFT_PROBS=draft_probs is None,
    )

    # 5. Random rejection
    rejection_random_sample_kernel[(batch_size, )](
        output_token_ids,
        draft_token_ids,
        draft_probs,
        target_probs,
        bonus_token_ids,
        recovered_token_ids,
        uniform_probs,
        is_greedy,
        num_spec_tokens,
        vocab_size,
        NO_DRAFT_PROBS=draft_probs is None,
    )

    return _extract_outputs(output_token_ids, num_spec_tokens)


@triton.jit(do_not_specialize=['num_spec_tokens'])
def rejection_greedy_sample_kernel(
    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1]
    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    target_argmax_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    bonus_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size]
    is_greedy_ptr,  # [batch_size] or None
    num_spec_tokens,
):
    """Greedy rejection sampling kernel.

    Grid: (batch_size,)
    For each request: if greedy, accept matching tokens, reject at first
    mismatch.
    """
    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
    if is_greedy_ptr is not None:
        is_greedy = tl.load(is_greedy_ptr + req_idx).to(tl.int1)
        if not is_greedy:
            return

    out_stride = num_spec_tokens + 1
    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens

    rejected = False
    for pos in range(num_spec_tokens):
        if not rejected:
            draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
            target_argmax_id = tl.load(target_argmax_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
            tl.store(
                output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + pos,
                target_argmax_id,
            )
            if draft_token_id != target_argmax_id:
                rejected = True

    if not rejected:
        bonus_token_id = tl.load(bonus_token_ids_ptr + req_idx)
        tl.store(
            output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + num_spec_tokens,
            bonus_token_id,
        )


@triton.jit(do_not_specialize=['num_spec_tokens'])
def rejection_random_sample_kernel(
    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens + 1]
    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    draft_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None
    target_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]
    bonus_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size]
    recovered_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    uniform_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    is_greedy_ptr,  # [batch_size]
    num_spec_tokens,
    vocab_size,
    NO_DRAFT_PROBS: tl.constexpr,
):
    """Random rejection sampling kernel.

    Grid: (batch_size,)
    For each non-greedy request: accept if target_prob/draft_prob >=
    uniform, else use recovered token.
    """
    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
    if is_greedy_ptr is not None:
        is_greedy = tl.load(is_greedy_ptr + req_idx).to(tl.int1)
        if is_greedy:
            return

    out_stride = num_spec_tokens + 1
    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens

    rejected = False
    for pos in range(num_spec_tokens):
        if not rejected:
            draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
            if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
                draft_prob = 1
            else:
                draft_prob = tl.load(draft_probs_ptr + (req_idx * draft_stride + pos) * vocab_size + draft_token_id)
            target_prob = tl.load(target_probs_ptr + (req_idx * draft_stride + pos) * vocab_size + draft_token_id)
            uniform_prob = tl.load(uniform_probs_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)

            if draft_prob > 0 and target_prob / draft_prob >= uniform_prob:
                token_id = draft_token_id
            else:
                rejected = True
                token_id = tl.load(recovered_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * draft_stride + pos)
            tl.store(
                output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + pos,
                token_id,
            )

    if not rejected:
        bonus_token_id = tl.load(bonus_token_ids_ptr + req_idx)
        tl.store(
            output_token_ids_ptr + req_idx * out_stride + num_spec_tokens,
            bonus_token_id,
        )


@triton.jit
def sample_recovered_tokens_kernel(
    output_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    draft_token_ids_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens]
    draft_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size] or None
    target_probs_ptr,  # [batch_size, num_spec_tokens, vocab_size]
    inv_q_ptr,  # [batch_size, vocab_size]
    num_spec_tokens,
    vocab_size,
    BLOCK_SIZE: tl.constexpr,
    NO_DRAFT_PROBS: tl.constexpr,
):
    """Recovered token sampling kernel via Gumbel-max trick.

    Grid: (batch_size, num_spec_tokens)
    For each position: find argmax of max(0, target_prob - draft_prob)
    * inv_q.
    """
    req_idx = tl.program_id(0)
    pos = tl.program_id(1)
    if pos >= num_spec_tokens:
        return

    draft_stride = num_spec_tokens
    token_idx = req_idx * draft_stride + pos

    if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
        draft_token_id = tl.load(draft_token_ids_ptr + token_idx)

    max_val = float('-inf')
    recovered_id = 0
    for v in range(0, vocab_size, BLOCK_SIZE):
        vocab_offset = v + tl.arange(0, BLOCK_SIZE)
        vocab_mask = vocab_offset < vocab_size

        if NO_DRAFT_PROBS:
            prob = tl.load(
                target_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
                mask=(vocab_mask & (vocab_offset != draft_token_id)),
                other=0.0,
            )
        else:
            draft_prob = tl.load(
                draft_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
                mask=vocab_mask,
                other=0.0,
            )
            target_prob = tl.load(
                target_probs_ptr + token_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
                mask=vocab_mask,
                other=0.0,
            )
            prob = tl.maximum(target_prob - draft_prob, 0.0)

        inv_q = tl.load(
            inv_q_ptr + req_idx * vocab_size + vocab_offset,
            mask=vocab_mask,
            other=0.0,
        )

        score = prob * inv_q
        local_max, local_id = tl.max(score, axis=0, return_indices=True)

        if local_max > max_val:
            max_val = local_max
            recovered_id = v + local_id

    tl.store(output_token_ids_ptr + token_idx, recovered_id)

# Copyright (c) OpenMMLab. All rights reserved.
from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

import torch

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    import xgrammar as xgr

    from ..engine.guided_process import GuidedDecodingManager


class GuidedSpecHelper:
    """Guided-decoding support for speculative decoding.

    Wraps a :class:`GuidedDecodingManager` and provides spec-decoding-specific
    operations that cannot be handled by :class:`FusedLogitsProcessor` because
    speculative decoding needs:

    * Position-serial bitmasking across N+1 positions (not 1).
    * Forked matchers to preserve originals for target-side verification.
    * Rejection-sampling-driven token acceptance (not direct argmax).
    * Draft-vocab bitmask translation (Eagle3).

    Instead of passing ``guided_decoding_manager`` into ``FusedLogitsProcessor``,
    the spec-decoding path constructs a ``GuidedSpecHelper`` and calls its
    methods at the appropriate points.

    All public methods are no-ops when constructed with ``guided_manager=None``
    or when no guided processors are active, so callers never need to guard
    with ``if guided_helper:`` or ``if processors:``.
    """

    def __init__(self, guided_manager: GuidedDecodingManager | None = None):
        self._mgr = guided_manager

    @property
    def manager(self) -> GuidedDecodingManager | None:
        """Access the underlying :class:`GuidedDecodingManager`."""
        return self._mgr

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Session lifecycle
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    def cleanup_sessions(self, session_ids: list[int] | None):
        """Remove grammar processors for ended sessions."""
        if self._mgr is None or not session_ids:
            return
        for session_id in session_ids:
            self._mgr.remove_processor(session_id)

    def get_processors(self, session_ctx, response_formats) -> dict[int, xgr.GrammarMatcher]:
        """Get grammar processors for active guided sessions.

        Returns an empty dict when no manager is set or no sessions are
        guided, so callers can use ``if processors:`` uniformly.
        """
        if self._mgr is None or session_ctx is None:
            return {}
        return self._mgr.get_processors(session_ctx, response_formats)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Draft side (called from proposer.get_outputs)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    async def prepare_bitmask(self, logits: torch.Tensor,
                              processors: dict[int, xgr.GrammarMatcher] | None) -> torch.Tensor | None:
        """Allocate and fill a guided-decoding bitmask for draft logits.

        Returns the filled bitmask tensor (or ``None`` if no guided processors
        are active).  The caller is responsible for applying the bitmask —
        some proposers (e.g. Eagle3) may need to translate the bitmask to
        their draft vocabulary first.
        """
        if not processors or self._mgr is None:
            return None
        bitmask = self._mgr.allocate_batched_bitmap(logits.size(0))

        def _fill():
            bitmask.data.fill_(-1)
            for idx, proc in processors.items():
                if not self._mgr.is_terminated(proc):
                    self._mgr.fill_bitmap(proc, bitmask, idx)

        await asyncio.to_thread(_fill)
        return bitmask

    def apply_bitmask(self, logits: torch.Tensor, bitmask: torch.Tensor | None):
        """Apply a guided bitmask to logits.

        No-op when *bitmask* is ``None``.
        """
        if bitmask is None or self._mgr is None:
            return
        self._mgr.apply_batched_bitmap(logits, bitmask)

    async def accept_draft_tokens(self, draft_token_ids: torch.Tensor,
                                  processors: dict[int, xgr.GrammarMatcher] | None):
        """Accept draft tokens on the provided (forked) grammar matchers.

        In speculative decoding the matchers are typically forked from the
        originals (created in :meth:`SpecModelAgent._async_model_forward`),
        so this method accepts on whichever matchers are passed in.
        """
        if not processors or self._mgr is None:
            return
        cpu_ids = draft_token_ids[:, 0].cpu()

        def _accept():
            for idx, proc in processors.items():
                if self._mgr.is_terminated(proc):
                    continue
                self._mgr.accept_token(proc, cpu_ids[idx].item())

        await asyncio.to_thread(_accept)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Target side: position-serial bitmask with forked matchers
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    async def apply_serial_bitmask(
        self,
        scores_3d: torch.Tensor,
        processors: dict[int, xgr.GrammarMatcher],
        draft_token_ids: torch.LongTensor,
        num_spec_tokens: int,
    ):
        """Apply position-serial grammar mask to target logits.

        Forks the provided processors, applies bitmask at each speculative
        position, and advances the forks using the draft tokens.  The original
        processors are **not** modified.

        No-op when *processors* is empty.

        Args:
            scores_3d: ``[batch_size, num_expand, vocab_size]`` logits tensor
                (modified in-place).
            processors: Original grammar matchers indexed by batch position.
            draft_token_ids: ``[batch_size, num_spec_tokens]`` draft tokens
                from the proposer.  Forks are advanced using these (not
                argmax) because target logits are conditioned on the draft
                tokens.
            num_spec_tokens: Number of speculative tokens per step.
        """
        if not processors or self._mgr is None:
            return
        forked = {idx: proc.fork() for idx, proc in processors.items()
                  if not self._mgr.is_terminated(proc)}
        cpu_draft = draft_token_ids.cpu()
        batch_size = scores_3d.size(0)
        num_expand = scores_3d.size(1)
        bitmask = self._mgr.allocate_batched_bitmap(batch_size)

        for pos in range(num_expand):
            await asyncio.to_thread(self._fill_bitmask, forked, bitmask)
            pos_logits = scores_3d[:, pos, :]
            self._mgr.apply_batched_bitmap(pos_logits, bitmask)
            scores_3d[:, pos, :] = pos_logits

            # Advance fork using draft tokens for draft positions.
            if pos < num_spec_tokens:
                await asyncio.to_thread(self._accept_forked_at_pos, forked, cpu_draft, pos)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Token acceptance (rejection-sampling-aware)
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    async def accept_rejection_sampled_tokens(
        self,
        processors: dict[int, xgr.GrammarMatcher],
        num_rejected: torch.Tensor,
        output_token_ids: torch.Tensor,
        next_token_ids: torch.Tensor,
        num_spec_tokens: int,
    ):
        """Accept rejection-sampled tokens on original grammar matchers.

        After rejection sampling, the original matchers must be advanced to
        reflect the accepted tokens.  For each sequence, ``num_spec_tokens -
        num_rejected`` draft tokens are accepted, followed by the bonus token.

        No-op when *processors* is empty.

        Args:
            processors: Original (non-forked) grammar matchers.
            num_rejected: Per-sequence rejection counts (GPU or CPU tensor).
            output_token_ids: Accepted output tokens ``[batch, num_spec]``
                (GPU or CPU tensor).
            next_token_ids: Bonus tokens ``[batch]`` (GPU or CPU tensor).
            num_spec_tokens: Number of speculative tokens per step.
        """
        if not processors or self._mgr is None:
            return
        cpu_num_rejected = num_rejected.cpu() if num_rejected.is_cuda else num_rejected
        cpu_output_token_ids = output_token_ids.cpu() if output_token_ids.is_cuda else output_token_ids
        cpu_next_token_ids = next_token_ids.cpu() if next_token_ids.is_cuda else next_token_ids

        def _accept():
            for idx, processor in processors.items():
                if self._mgr.is_terminated(processor):
                    continue
                n_rejected = cpu_num_rejected[idx].item()
                n_valid_draft = num_spec_tokens - n_rejected
                for pos in range(n_valid_draft):
                    tid = cpu_output_token_ids[idx, pos].item()
                    if tid >= 0:
                        self._mgr.accept_token(processor, tid)
                self._mgr.accept_token(processor, cpu_next_token_ids[idx].item())

        await asyncio.to_thread(_accept)

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Private helpers
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------

    def _fill_bitmask(self, processors: dict, bitmask: torch.Tensor):
        bitmask.data.fill_(-1)
        for idx, proc in processors.items():
            if not self._mgr.is_terminated(proc):
                self._mgr.fill_bitmap(proc, bitmask, idx)

    def _accept_forked_at_pos(self, forked: dict, cpu_draft: torch.Tensor, pos: int):
        for idx, fork_proc in forked.items():
            if self._mgr.is_terminated(fork_proc):
                continue
            self._mgr.accept_token(fork_proc, cpu_draft[idx, pos].item())

18	from ..engine.cache_engine import CacheEngine
19	from ..engine.logits_process import FusedLogitsProcessor, SamplingInputs, _torch_topk
20	from ..engine.model_agent.agent import BatchedLogProbs
21	from ..model_inputs import DPMeta, ModelInputs
22	from ..strategies.ar_spec.model_agent import ARSpecExtraInputs
23	from ..strategies.base.model_agent import ExtraInputs

28	if TYPE_CHECKING:
29	    pass

31	logger = get_logger('lmdeploy')
32	
33	# Fields that hold a single scalar value shared across the expanded batch.
34	_SCALAR_FIELDS = frozenset({
35	    'max_top_k', 'min_top_p', 'max_num_logprobs',
36	    'max_repetition_ngram_size',
37	})
38	# Fields that are global (not per-batch-element) and should not be
39	# repeated when expanding sampling inputs.
40	_GLOBAL_FIELDS = frozenset({
41	    'session_to_cleanup',
42	})
43	
44	
45	def _expand_sampling_inputs(sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs, num_tokens: int) -> SamplingInputs:
46	    """Expand per-batch SamplingInputs to per-token by repeating each batch
47	    element num_tokens times via repeat_interleave.
48	
49	    Args:
50	        sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs with batch_size elements.
51	        num_tokens: Number of tokens per batch element.
52	
53	    Returns:
54	        New SamplingInputs with batch_size * num_tokens elements.
55	    """
56	    if num_tokens == 1:
57	        return sampling_inputs
58	
59	    from dataclasses import fields
60	    out_dict = {}
61	    for f in fields(sampling_inputs):
62	        k = f.name
63	        v = getattr(sampling_inputs, k)
64	        if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor):
65	            v = v.repeat_interleave(num_tokens, dim=0)
66	            if k == 'random_offsets':
67	                # Each token position needs a different offset for
68	                # reproducible but distinct random sampling
69	                arange = torch.arange(num_tokens, device=v.device)
70	                v = v + arange.repeat(sampling_inputs.batch_size)
71	        elif k in _SCALAR_FIELDS or k in _GLOBAL_FIELDS:
72	            pass
73	        elif isinstance(v, np.ndarray) and v.ndim >= 1 and v.shape[0] == sampling_inputs.batch_size:
74	            v = np.repeat(v, num_tokens, axis=0)
75	        elif isinstance(v, (list, tuple)) and len(v) == sampling_inputs.batch_size:
76	            v = type(v)(_item for elem in v for _item in [elem] * num_tokens)
77	        out_dict[k] = v
78	
79	    out_dict['batch_size'] = sampling_inputs.batch_size * num_tokens
80	    return SamplingInputs(**out_dict)
81	
82	
83	def _slice_sampling_inputs(sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs, num_tokens: int, is_last: bool = True) -> SamplingInputs:
84	    """Slice expanded SamplingInputs.
85	
86	    After _expand_sampling_inputs repeats each batch element num_tokens
87	    times, this function extracts a subset per batch element.
88	
89	    Args:
90	        sampling_inputs: Expanded SamplingInputs with
91	            batch_size * num_tokens elements.
92	        num_tokens: Number of tokens per batch element.
93	        is_last: If True (default), take the last token per batch element
94	            (for bonus token sampling), returning batch_size elements.
95	            If False, take the first num_tokens-1 tokens per batch element
96	            (all except the last), returning
97	            batch_size * (num_tokens - 1) elements.
98	
99	    Returns:
100	        Sliced SamplingInputs.
101	    """
102	    if num_tokens == 1:
103	        return sampling_inputs
104	
105	    from dataclasses import fields
106	
107	    batch_size = sampling_inputs.batch_size // num_tokens
108	    out_dict = {}
109	    for f in fields(sampling_inputs):
110	        k = f.name
111	        v = getattr(sampling_inputs, k)
112	        if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor):
113	            if is_last:
114	                v = v[num_tokens - 1::num_tokens]
115	            else:
116	                shape = v.shape
117	                v = v.view(batch_size, num_tokens, *shape[1:])
118	                v = v[:, :-1].reshape(batch_size * (num_tokens - 1), *shape[1:])
119	        elif k in _SCALAR_FIELDS or k in _GLOBAL_FIELDS:
120	            pass
121	        elif isinstance(v, np.ndarray) and v.ndim >= 1 and v.shape[0] == sampling_inputs.batch_size:
122	            if is_last:
123	                v = v[num_tokens - 1::num_tokens]
124	            else:
125	                v = v.reshape(batch_size, num_tokens, *v.shape[1:])[:, :-1].reshape(
126	                    batch_size * (num_tokens - 1), *v.shape[1:])
127	        elif isinstance(v, (list, tuple)):
128	            # Skip if length doesn't match the expanded batch size (e.g.
129	            # empty defaults or fields that were not per-batch).
130	            if len(v) == sampling_inputs.batch_size:
131	                if is_last:
132	                    indices = list(range(num_tokens - 1, len(v), num_tokens))
133	                    v = type(v)(v[i] for i in indices)
134	                else:
135	                    indices = []
136	                    for b in range(batch_size):
137	                        start = b * num_tokens
138	                        indices.extend(range(start, start + num_tokens - 1))
139	                    v = type(v)(v[i] for i in indices)
140	        out_dict[k] = v
141	
142	    if is_last:
143	        out_dict['batch_size'] = batch_size
144	    else:
145	        out_dict['batch_size'] = batch_size * (num_tokens - 1)
146	    return SamplingInputs(**out_dict)
147	
148	
149	class SpecModelAgent(BaseSpecModelAgent):
150	    """Speculative model agent."""
151	
152	    def __init__(
153	        self,
154	        specdecode_config: SpecDecodeConfig,
155	        backend_config: BackendConfig,
156	        inputs_strategy,
157	        agent_strategy,
158	        misc_config: MiscConfig,
159	        dist_ctx: DistContext,
160	        device: str = 'cuda',
161	    ):
162	        super().__init__(specdecode_config,
163	                         backend_config,
164	                         inputs_strategy,
165	                         agent_strategy,
166	                         misc_config,
167	                         dist_ctx,
168	                         device,
169	                         )
170	
171	        self.proposer = build_specdecode_proposer(specdecode_config, device=device)
172	
173	        # Guided decoding — set by ModelAgent after construction
174	        self.guided_helper = GuidedSpecHelper()
175	
176	        # make dummy meta
177	        self.make_dummy_meta = self.inputs_strategy.create_make_dummy_meta(self.model_config)
178	        self._init_runtime_state()
179	
180	    def _init_runtime_state(self):
181	        """Initialize request-local draft carry state."""
182	        self._prev_chunk_last = {}
183	
184	    def reset_runtime_state(self):
185	        """Discard request-local draft carry state after sleep cancels
186	        sessions."""
187	        self._prev_chunk_last.clear()
188	
189	    @contextmanager
190	    def draft_context(self):
191	        """Draft-local dist context."""
192	        dist_mgr = get_dist_manager()
193	        with dist_mgr.context(self.draft_dist_ctx):
194	            yield
195	
196	    def set_cache_config(self, cache_config: CacheConfig):
197	        """Set all cache config."""
198	        self.cache_config = cache_config
199	
200	    def set_model_config(self, model_config: ModelConfig):
201	        """Set model config."""
202	        self.model_config = model_config
203	        if model_config is not None:
204	            # make dummy meta
205	            self.make_dummy_meta = self.inputs_strategy.create_make_dummy_meta(self.model_config)
206	
207	    def build_model(self, empty_init: bool, target_model=None, build_model_ctx=None):
208	        """Build draft model."""
209	        with self.draft_context():
210	            self.proposer.build_model(empty_init, target_model=target_model, build_model_ctx=build_model_ctx)
211	
212	    def build_graph_runner(self):
213	        """Build graph runner."""
214	        with self.draft_context():
215	            backend = get_backend()
216	            self.proposer.model = backend.build_graph_runner(self.proposer.model,
217	                                                             model_config=self.model_config,
218	                                                             cache_config=self.cache_config,
219	                                                             backend_config=self.backend_config,
220	                                                             device=self.device)
221	
222	    def build_cache_engine(self, cache_stream: torch.cuda.Stream):
223	        """Build cache engine."""
224	        if self.cache_config is not None:
225	            with self.draft_context():
226	                draft_tp = self.draft_dist_ctx.dist_config.attn_tp
227	                self.cache_engine = CacheEngine(self.cache_config,
228	                                                self.model_config,
229	                                                rank=0 if draft_tp == 1 else self.dist_ctx.rank,
230	                                                tp_rank=self.draft_dist_ctx.attn_tp_group.rank,
231	                                                world_size=draft_tp,
232	                                                cache_stream=cache_stream)
233	
234	    def _build_dp_meta_from_main(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor, dp_meta: DPMeta | None):
235	        """Build DP meta for draft inputs after MTP input shifting."""
236	        if dp_meta is None:
237	            return None
238	
239	        all_num_tokens = dp_meta.dp_draft_num_tokens
240	        if all_num_tokens is None:
241	            return dp_meta
242	
243	        all_num_tokens = list(all_num_tokens)
244	        with self.draft_context():
245	            draft_dp_meta = DPMeta.build(input_ids.numel(), all_num_tokens)
246	        draft_dp_meta.dp_batches = dp_meta.dp_batches
247	        draft_dp_meta.dp_is_decoding = dp_meta.dp_is_decoding
248	        return draft_dp_meta
249	
250	    def _prepare_inputs_from_main(self, model_inputs: ModelInputs, extra_inputs: ExtraInputs):
251	        """Update inputs from main model inputs."""
252	        next_token_ids = extra_inputs.next_token_ids
253	        last_token_indices = extra_inputs.last_token_indices
254	        # create new inputs for draft model (offset by 1 from main model)
255	        target_hidden_states = extra_inputs.target_hidden_states
256	        target_position_ids = extra_inputs.target_position_ids
257	        target_inputs_embeds = extra_inputs.target_inputs_embeds
258	        mrope_pos_ids = model_inputs.mrope_pos_ids
259	        seq_length = model_inputs.seq_length
260	        max_q_seqlen = model_inputs.max_q_seqlen
261	        max_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.max_kv_seqlen
262	        sum_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.sum_kv_seqlen
263	        history_lengths = model_inputs.history_lengths.clone()
264	
265	        if not model_inputs.is_chunk:
266	            # Non-chunk prefill/decode can be interleaved between long-context
267	            # chunks. Keep pending chunk carry here; a new first chunk clears it
268	            # explicitly, and the final chunk consumes it.
269	            # Case A: non-chunked — shift left by 1, place next_token at end
270	            input_ids = model_inputs.input_ids.clone()
271	            input_ids[:, :-1] = model_inputs.input_ids[:, 1:]
272	            input_ids[:, last_token_indices] = next_token_ids
273	
274	            if target_inputs_embeds is not None:
275	                input_embeds = target_inputs_embeds.clone()
276	                input_embeds[:, :-1, :] = target_inputs_embeds[:, 1:, :]
277	                next_token_embeds = self.proposer.embed_input_ids(next_token_ids)
278	                input_embeds[:, last_token_indices, :] = next_token_embeds
279	                target_inputs_embeds = input_embeds
280	
281	        else:
282	            if model_inputs.is_first_chunk:
283	                # clear each time
284	                self._prev_chunk_last.clear()
285	                # Case B: first chunk — skip first token, save last for next chunk
286	                input_ids = model_inputs.input_ids[:, 1:]
287	                seq_length = model_inputs.seq_length - 1
288	                # Shift indices into the draft layout after dropping the first token.
289	                last_token_indices = last_token_indices - 1
290	                max_q_seqlen = model_inputs.max_q_seqlen - 1
291	                max_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.max_kv_seqlen - 1
292	                sum_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.sum_kv_seqlen - 1
293	
294	                target_hidden_states = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_save_last('hidden_states', target_hidden_states)
295	                if target_position_ids is not None:
296	                    target_position_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_save_last(
297	                        'position_ids', target_position_ids)
298	                if target_inputs_embeds is not None:
299	                    target_inputs_embeds = target_inputs_embeds[:, 1:]
300	                if mrope_pos_ids is not None:
301	                    mrope_pos_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_save_last('mrope_pos_ids', mrope_pos_ids)
302	
303	            elif model_inputs.is_last_chunk:
304	                # Case C: last chunk — prepend saved last, append next_token
305	                seq_length = model_inputs.seq_length + 1
306	                max_q_seqlen = model_inputs.max_q_seqlen + 1
307	                last_token_indices = last_token_indices + 1
308	                # history_lengths is decremented below, while seq_length is
309	                # incremented above. The final KV length is unchanged, so keep
310	                # the aggregate KV metadata aligned with kv_seqlens.
311	                max_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.max_kv_seqlen
312	                sum_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.sum_kv_seqlen
313	                history_lengths = model_inputs.history_lengths - 1
314	                input_ids = torch.cat([model_inputs.input_ids, next_token_ids.unsqueeze(0)], dim=-1)
315	
316	                target_hidden_states = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved('hidden_states',
317	                                                                                      target_hidden_states,
318	                                                                                      save_last=False)
319	                if target_position_ids is not None:
320	                    target_position_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved('position_ids',
321	                                                                                         target_position_ids,
322	                                                                                         save_last=False)
323	                if target_inputs_embeds is not None:
324	                    next_token_embeds = self.proposer.embed_input_ids(next_token_ids)[None]
325	                    target_inputs_embeds = torch.cat(
326	                        [target_inputs_embeds, next_token_embeds], dim=1)
327	                if mrope_pos_ids is not None:
328	                    mrope_pos_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved('mrope_pos_ids',
329	                                                                                   mrope_pos_ids,
330	                                                                                   save_last=False)
331	
332	                # clear cross-chunk state
333	                self._prev_chunk_last.clear()
334	            else:
335	                # Case D: middle chunk — prepend saved last, save current last
336	                input_ids = model_inputs.input_ids
337	                max_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.max_kv_seqlen - 1
338	                sum_kv_seqlen = model_inputs.sum_kv_seqlen - 1
339	                history_lengths = model_inputs.history_lengths - 1
340	
341	                target_hidden_states = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved(
342	                    'hidden_states', target_hidden_states)
343	                if target_position_ids is not None:
344	                    target_position_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved(
345	                        'position_ids', target_position_ids)
346	                if mrope_pos_ids is not None:
347	                    mrope_pos_ids = self._prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved('mrope_pos_ids', mrope_pos_ids)
348	
349	        # Keep draft model local decoding state; DP-global state stays in dp_meta.
350	        is_decoding = model_inputs.is_decoding
351	        dp_meta = self._build_dp_meta_from_main(input_ids, model_inputs.dp_meta)
352	
353	        new_model_inputs = ModelInputs(
354	            input_ids=input_ids,
355	            seq_length=seq_length,
356	            max_kv_seqlen=max_kv_seqlen,
357	            max_q_seqlen=max_q_seqlen,
358	            sum_kv_seqlen=sum_kv_seqlen,
359	            history_lengths=history_lengths,
360	            block_offsets=model_inputs.block_offsets,
361	            num_ignored_history=model_inputs.num_ignored_history,
362	            is_decoding=is_decoding,
363	            target_hidden_states=target_hidden_states,
364	            target_position_ids=target_position_ids,
365	            target_inputs_embeds=target_inputs_embeds,
366	            mrope_pos_ids=mrope_pos_ids,
367	            is_chunk=model_inputs.is_chunk,
368	            is_first_chunk=model_inputs.is_first_chunk,
369	            is_last_chunk=model_inputs.is_last_chunk,
370	            is_dummy=model_inputs.is_dummy,
371	            dp_meta=dp_meta,
372	        )
373	
374	        # update if dp > 1
375	        if dp_meta is not None:
376	            if new_model_inputs.global_is_decoding():
377	                padding_batch_size = max(dp_meta.dp_batches)
378	                meta = self.proposer.model.get_meta()
379	                meta.padding_batch_size = padding_batch_size
380	            new_model_inputs = self.proposer.model.update_inputs(new_model_inputs)
381	
382	        new_extra_inputs = extra_inputs.clone(
383	            target_hidden_states=None,
384	            target_inputs_embeds=None,
385	            target_position_ids=None,
386	            last_token_indices=last_token_indices,
387	        )
388	        return new_model_inputs, new_extra_inputs
389	
390	    def _prepare_long_context_chunk_save_last(self, key, tensor):
391	        """Save the last entry of a tensor for cross-chunk carry-over."""
392	        self._prev_chunk_last[key] = tensor[:, -1:]
393	        return tensor[:, :-1]
394	
395	    def _prepare_long_context_chunk_prepend_saved(self, key, tensor, save_last=True):
396	        """Prepend saved last entry from previous chunk."""
397	        saved = self._prev_chunk_last[key]
398	        if save_last:
399	            self._prev_chunk_last[key] = tensor[:, -1:]
400	            tensor = tensor[:, :-1]
401	        else:
402	            self._prev_chunk_last.pop(key, None)
403	        return torch.cat([saved, tensor], dim=1)
404	
405	    async def _rejection_sampling(self, model_inputs: ModelInputs, extra_inputs: ARSpecExtraInputs,
406	                                  sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs):
407	        """Do rejection sampling."""
408	
409	        @torch.inference_mode()
410	        def __compute_logprobs(raw_logprobs: torch.Tensor, token_ids: torch.LongTensor,
411	                               max_num_logprobs: int):
412	            """Compute logprobs."""
413	            if raw_logprobs is None or max_num_logprobs <= 0:
414	                return None
415	
416	            indices = token_ids.flatten().unsqueeze(-1)
417	            clamped_indices = indices.clamp_min(0)
418	            logprobs = raw_logprobs.gather(-1, clamped_indices)
419	            topk_logprobs, topk_indices = _torch_topk(raw_logprobs, max_num_logprobs, dim=-1)
420	            logprobs = torch.cat([logprobs, topk_logprobs], dim=-1)
421	            indices = torch.cat([indices, topk_indices], dim=-1).to(torch.int32)
422	            output_logprobs = BatchedLogProbs(
423	                vals=logprobs,
424	                indices=indices,
425	            )
426	            return output_logprobs
427	
428	        target_logits = extra_inputs.target_logits
429	        batch_size = model_inputs.seq_length.size(0)
430	        num_rejected_tokens = torch.zeros_like(model_inputs.seq_length)
431	        last_token_indices = model_inputs.seq_length.cumsum(0) - 1
432	
433	        if model_inputs.is_dummy:
434	            # skip rejection sampling for dummy inputs
435	            next_token_ids = model_inputs.input_ids.new_zeros(batch_size)
436	            output_len = 1 + self.num_spec_tokens if model_inputs.is_decoding else 1
437	            output_token_ids = model_inputs.input_ids.new_zeros(batch_size, output_len)
438	            new_extra_inputs = extra_inputs.clone(
439	                next_token_ids=next_token_ids,
440	                last_token_indices=last_token_indices,
441	                num_rejected_tokens=num_rejected_tokens,
442	                output_token_ids=output_token_ids,
443	                target_logits=None,  # clear for next step
444	                logprobs=None,
445	                )
446	            return new_extra_inputs
447	
448	        num_expand_sampling = 1 if not model_inputs.is_decoding else self.num_spec_tokens + 1
449	        expanded_sampling_inputs = _expand_sampling_inputs(sampling_inputs, num_expand_sampling)
450	        guided_helper = self.guided_helper
451	        guided_helper.cleanup_sessions(sampling_inputs.session_to_cleanup)
452	        guided_processors = guided_helper.get_processors(
453	            sampling_inputs.session_ctx, sampling_inputs.response_formats)
454	
455	        if model_inputs.is_decoding:
456	            if guided_processors:
457	                # Position-serial grammar mask via forked matchers;
458	                # original matchers are NOT modified.
459	                processed_logits, raw_logprobs = await self._guided_spec_logits_process(
460	                    target_logits, expanded_sampling_inputs, guided_helper,
461	                    guided_processors, batch_size, num_expand_sampling,
462	                    draft_token_ids=extra_inputs.output_draft_token_ids)
463	            else:
464	                logits_processor = FusedLogitsProcessor(
465	                    expanded_sampling_inputs,
466	                    logprobs_mode=self.misc_config.logprobs_mode,
467	                )
468	                processed_logits, raw_logprobs = await logits_processor(target_logits)
469	
470	            # Bonus logits already have grammar mask applied in guided path
471	            bonus_logits = processed_logits[num_expand_sampling - 1::num_expand_sampling]  # [batch_size, vocab]
472	
473	            bonus_sampling_inputs = _slice_sampling_inputs(expanded_sampling_inputs, num_expand_sampling)
474	
475	            logits_processor = FusedLogitsProcessor(
476	                bonus_sampling_inputs,
477	                logprobs_mode=self.misc_config.logprobs_mode,
478	            )
479	
480	            next_token_ids = logits_processor.sampling(bonus_logits)  # [batch_size]
481	
482	            processed_logits = processed_logits.view(batch_size, num_expand_sampling, -1)
483	            # Rejection sampling on processed logits (exclude bonus position)
484	            target_draft_logits = processed_logits[:, :-1].contiguous()  # [batch, num_spec, vocab]
485	            draft_sampling_inputs = _slice_sampling_inputs(expanded_sampling_inputs, num_expand_sampling, is_last=False)
486	            output_token_ids, num_rejected_tokens, next_token_ids = self.rejection_sampler(
487	                target_draft_logits,
488	                extra_inputs.output_draft_token_ids,
489	                next_token_ids,
490	                sampling_inputs=draft_sampling_inputs,
491	            )
492	            last_token_indices = last_token_indices - num_rejected_tokens
493	
494	            # Guided: accept final tokens on original matchers.
495	            # Forked matchers were used during processing, so originals are still
496	            # at pre-step state.  Accept rejection-sampled output + bonus token
497	            # to bring originals to the correct state for the next step.
498	            await guided_helper.accept_rejection_sampled_tokens(
499	                guided_processors,
500	                num_rejected_tokens,
501	                output_token_ids,
502	                next_token_ids,
503	                self.num_spec_tokens,
504	            )
505	        else:
506	            # Prefill path — handle guided decoding manually (same pattern as
507	            # the decode path) to keep accept_token in asyncio.to_thread and
508	            # avoid the double-accept bug that occurs when
509	            # FusedLogitsProcessor.sampling() also calls accept_token.
510	            logits_processor = FusedLogitsProcessor(
511	                expanded_sampling_inputs,
512	                logprobs_mode=self.misc_config.logprobs_mode,
513	            )
514	            if model_inputs.is_chunk and not model_inputs.is_last_chunk:
515	                # dummy output, no need to sampling or compute logprobs for non-last chunk
516	                next_token_ids = num_rejected_tokens
517	                output_token_ids = num_rejected_tokens.unsqueeze(-1)
518	                raw_logprobs = None
519	            else:
520	                bonus_logits, raw_logprobs = await logits_processor(target_logits)
521	                # Apply guided bitmask (no fork needed — single position)
522	                guided_bitmask = await guided_helper.prepare_bitmask(bonus_logits, guided_processors)
523	                guided_helper.apply_bitmask(bonus_logits, guided_bitmask)
524	                next_token_ids = logits_processor.sampling(bonus_logits)  # [batch_size]
525	                output_token_ids = next_token_ids.unsqueeze(-1)
526	                # Accept the sampled token on original grammar matchers
527	                await guided_helper.accept_rejection_sampled_tokens(
528	                    guided_processors,
529	                    torch.zeros(next_token_ids.shape,
530	                                dtype=next_token_ids.dtype),
531	                    output_token_ids,
532	                    next_token_ids,
533	                    0,  # num_spec_tokens=0, only bonus accepted
534	                )
535	
536	        logprobs = __compute_logprobs(raw_logprobs, output_token_ids, sampling_inputs.max_num_logprobs)
537	
538	        new_extra_inputs = extra_inputs.clone(
539	            next_token_ids=next_token_ids,
540	            last_token_indices=last_token_indices,
541	            num_rejected_tokens=num_rejected_tokens,
542	            output_token_ids=output_token_ids,
543	            target_logits=None,  # clear for next step
544	            logprobs=logprobs,
545	        )
546	        return new_extra_inputs
547	
548	    async def _guided_spec_logits_process(
549	        self,
550	        target_logits: torch.Tensor,
551	        expanded_sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs,
552	        guided_helper: GuidedSpecHelper,
553	        guided_processors: dict,
554	        batch_size: int,
555	        num_expand: int,
556	        draft_token_ids: torch.LongTensor,
557	    ) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor | None]:
558	        """Apply position-serial grammar mask to target logits for spec decode.
559	
560	        Uses forked GrammarMatchers so that the original matchers are NOT
561	        modified.  The caller is responsible for accepting the final tokens
562	        on the original matchers after rejection sampling.
563	
564	        All ``num_expand`` positions (including the bonus position) are masked.
565	        """
566	        logits_processor = FusedLogitsProcessor(
567	            expanded_sampling_inputs,
568	            logprobs_mode=self.misc_config.logprobs_mode,
569	        )
570	        scores, raw_logprobs = await logits_processor(target_logits)
571	
572	        if not guided_processors:
573	            return scores, raw_logprobs
574	
575	        scores_3d = scores.view(batch_size, num_expand, -1)
576	        await guided_helper.apply_serial_bitmask(
577	            scores_3d, guided_processors, draft_token_ids, self.num_spec_tokens)
578	
579	        scores = scores_3d.view(batch_size * num_expand, -1)
580	        return scores, raw_logprobs
581	
582	    def _forward_impl(self, inputs: ModelInputs):
583	        """Forward impl."""
584	        with self.draft_context():
585	            output = self.proposer._forward(inputs, cache_engine=self.cache_engine)
586	        return output
587	
588	    async def async_sampling_logits(self, model_inputs: ModelInputs, extra_inputs: ARSpecExtraInputs,
589	                                    sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs):
590	        """Sample target logits and run rejection sampling."""
591	        with record_function('spec_rejection_sampling'):
592	            return await self._rejection_sampling(model_inputs, extra_inputs, sampling_inputs)
593	
594	    async def _async_model_forward(self, inputs: ModelInputs, extra_inputs: ARSpecExtraInputs,
595	                                   sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs):
596	        """Model forward.
597	
598	        Args:
599	            inputs (dict): The input data comes from _make_inputs.
600	        """
601	        def __build_dp_meta(inputs: ModelInputs):
602	            """Prepare for dp."""
603	            # update inputs for draft model
604	            dp_meta = inputs.dp_meta
605	            padding_batch_size = None
606	            if dp_meta is None:
607	                return dp_meta, None
608	
609	            padding_batch_size = max(dp_meta.dp_batches)
610	            new_dpmeta = DPMeta.build(inputs.input_ids.numel(), dp_meta.dp_batches)
611	            new_dpmeta.dp_is_decoding = dp_meta.dp_is_decoding
612	            return new_dpmeta, padding_batch_size
613	
614	        def _update_dp_model_inputs(inputs: ModelInputs, dp_meta: DPMeta, padding_batch_size: int | None):
615	            if dp_meta is None:
616	                return inputs
617	
618	            inputs.dp_meta = dp_meta
619	            meta = self.proposer.model.get_meta()
620	            meta.padding_batch_size = padding_batch_size
621	            logger.debug(f'SpecAgent rank={self.rank} padding_batch_size={padding_batch_size} dp_meta={dp_meta}')
622	            # update dp meta
623	            inputs = self.proposer.model.update_inputs(inputs)
624	            return inputs
625	
626	        outputs = self._forward_impl(inputs)
627	        if inputs.dp_meta is None and inputs.is_chunk and not inputs.is_last_chunk:
628	            # DP=1 non-last chunks do not consume draft tokens, so skip the
629	            # remaining speculative forwards.
630	            output_draft_ids = inputs.input_ids.new_zeros(inputs.seq_length.size(0), self.num_spec_tokens)
631	        else:
632	            # Fork guided processors for draft model.
633	            draft_guided_processors = None
634	            orig_processors = self.guided_helper.get_processors(
635	                sampling_inputs.session_ctx if sampling_inputs else None,
636	                sampling_inputs.response_formats if sampling_inputs else None)
637	            if orig_processors:
638	                draft_guided_processors = {idx: proc.fork()
639	                                           for idx, proc in orig_processors.items()
640	                                           if not self.guided_helper.manager.is_terminated(proc)}
641	
642	            loop_count = self.num_spec_tokens - 1
643	            draft_token_ids, model_metas, target_hidden_states = await self.proposer.get_outputs(
644	                outputs, inputs, extra_inputs,
645	                guided_processors=draft_guided_processors)
646	            draft_tokens_li = [draft_token_ids]
647	            if loop_count > 0:
648	                inputs = self.proposer.update_inputs_decoding(inputs, extra_inputs, draft_token_ids.transpose(0, 1),
649	                                                              target_hidden_states, model_metas)
650	                # set last_token_indices to None for decoding
651	                extra_inputs.last_token_indices = None
652	                # for dp > 1, need to update dp_meta and model inputs for next loop
653	                dp_meta, padding_batch_size = __build_dp_meta(inputs)
654	                # pad block_offsets for non-last chunks dummy run when dp>1
655	                if dp_meta is not None and inputs.is_chunk and not inputs.is_last_chunk:
656	                    inputs.block_offsets = torch.nn.functional.pad(inputs.block_offsets, (0, 1), value=0)
657	                for loop_idx in range(loop_count):
658	                    inputs = _update_dp_model_inputs(inputs, dp_meta, padding_batch_size)
659	                    outputs = self._forward_impl(inputs)
660	                    draft_token_ids, model_metas, target_hidden_states = await self.proposer.get_outputs(
661	                        outputs, inputs,
662	                        guided_processors=draft_guided_processors)
663	                    draft_tokens_li.append(draft_token_ids)
664	                    if loop_idx < loop_count - 1:
665	                        step_seqlens = inputs.seq_length.new_ones(inputs.seq_length.size(0))
666	                        inputs = inputs.step(draft_token_ids.transpose(0, 1), step_seqlens)
667	                        inputs.model_metas = model_metas
668	                        inputs.target_hidden_states = target_hidden_states
669	                        if inputs.target_position_ids is not None:
670	                            inputs.target_position_ids += 1
671	
672	            output_draft_ids = torch.cat(draft_tokens_li, dim=-1)
673	
674	        # create new extra inputs
675	        extra_inputs = ARSpecExtraInputs(
676	            output_draft_token_ids=output_draft_ids,
677	            next_token_ids=extra_inputs.next_token_ids,
678	            num_rejected_tokens=extra_inputs.num_rejected_tokens,
679	            output_token_ids=extra_inputs.output_token_ids,
680	            logprobs=extra_inputs.logprobs,
681	        )
682	        return extra_inputs
683	
684	    async def async_model_forward(
685	        self,
686	        model_inputs: ModelInputs,
687	        extra_inputs: ExtraInputs,
688	        sampling_inputs: SamplingInputs,
689	    ):
690	        """Draft model forward."""
691	        draft_model_inputs, draft_extra_inputs = self._prepare_inputs_from_main(model_inputs, extra_inputs)
692	        return await self._async_model_forward(draft_model_inputs, draft_extra_inputs, sampling_inputs)
693	
694	    def _build_warmup_dp_meta(self, inputs: ModelInputs):
695	        """Build dp_meta for warmup dummy inputs.
696	
697	        During warmup all ranks use the same dummy batch size, so the local token count can be broadcast to every rank
698	        entry in num_tokens. Must be called inside draft_context so DPMeta.build uses the correct dist groups.
699	        """
700	        draft_dist_config = self.draft_dist_ctx.dist_config
701	        if draft_dist_config.dp > 1:
702	            num_tokens = inputs.input_ids.numel()
703	            batch_size = inputs.seq_length.numel()
704	            with self.draft_context():
705	                inputs.build_dp_meta([num_tokens] * draft_dist_config.world_size)
706	            inputs.dp_meta.dp_batches = [batch_size] * draft_dist_config.world_size
707	            inputs.dp_meta.dp_is_decoding = inputs.is_decoding
708	
709	    def warmup(self, max_batches: int, target_model_config: ModelConfig):
710	        """warmup."""
711	
712	        with self.draft_context():
713	            dist_config = self.draft_dist_ctx.dist_config
714	            if dist_config.dp > 1:
715	                dist.barrier(group=self.draft_dist_ctx.cpu_group)
716	
717	            target_hidden_size = self.proposer.get_target_hidden_size(target_model_config)
718	
719	            # warmup prefill
720	            inputs = self.inputs_strategy.make_dummy(max_batches,
721	                                                     is_decoding=False,
722	                                                     device='cuda',
723	                                                     vocab_size=self.model_config.vocab_size,
724	                                                     target_hidden_size=target_hidden_size,
725	                                                     target_dtype=self.model_config.dtype,
726	                                                     meta=self.make_dummy_meta)
727	            self._build_warmup_dp_meta(inputs)
728	
729	            # warmup prefill
730	            self._forward_impl(inputs)
731	            torch.cuda.synchronize()
732	
733	            capture_batch_sizes = self.proposer.model.get_capture_batch_sizes()
734	            capture_batch_sizes = sorted(capture_batch_sizes, reverse=True)
735	
736	            # warmup decode
737	            for batch_size in capture_batch_sizes:
738	                # decode with num_spec_tokens + 1 per seq
739	                inputs = self.inputs_strategy.make_dummy(batch_size,
740	                                                         is_decoding=True,
741	                                                         device='cuda',
742	                                                         vocab_size=self.model_config.vocab_size,
743	                                                         max_q_seqlen=self.num_spec_tokens + 1,
744	                                                         target_hidden_size=target_hidden_size,
745	                                                         target_dtype=self.model_config.dtype,
746	                                                         meta=self.make_dummy_meta)
747	                self._build_warmup_dp_meta(inputs)
748	                self._forward_impl(inputs)
749	                torch.cuda.synchronize()
750	                # decode 1 tokens per sequence
751	                inputs = self.inputs_strategy.make_dummy(batch_size,
752	                                                         is_decoding=True,
753	                                                         device='cuda',
754	                                                         vocab_size=self.model_config.vocab_size,
755	                                                         max_q_seqlen=1,
756	                                                         target_hidden_size=self.model_config.hidden_size,
757	                                                         target_dtype=self.model_config.dtype,
758	                                                         meta=self.make_dummy_meta)
759	                self._build_warmup_dp_meta(inputs)
760	                self._forward_impl(inputs)
761	                torch.cuda.synchronize()
762	
763	    def reset_graph_runner(self):
764	        """Reset graph runner."""
765	        with self.draft_context():
766	            self._prev_chunk_last.clear()
767	            if self.proposer.model is not None and hasattr(self.proposer.model, 'reset'):
768	                self.proposer.model.reset()
769	
770	    def get_model(self):
771	        """Get model."""
772	        return self.proposer.model.get_model()
773
